results.prompt: Find expense line items for the R&D Engineering department over $10,000.
results.output:
```sql
SELECT line_item_id, department, description, amount
FROM expense_line_items
WHERE department = 'R&D Engineering' AND amount > 10000;
```

| Line Item ID | Department | Description | Amount |
|--------------|------------|-------------|--------|
| [Result]     | R&D Engineering | [Result] | [Result] |

results.prompt: Find expense line items for the R&D Engineering department over $10,000.
Find expense line items for the R&D Engineering department over $10,000.
results.output:
```sql
SELECT 
  e.id,
  e.budget_id,
  e.department_id,
  e.category,
  e.amount_usd,
  e.incurred_at,
  e.description
FROM expenses e
JOIN departments d ON e.department_id = d.id
WHERE d.name = 'R&D Engineering' 
  AND e.amount_usd > 10000
```
